title: Revamped PvP
description: A Modpack aiming to give you the best PvP experience possible, with great optimization.
body:
# Overview
It is quite difficult to PvP without mods to aid your gameplay. But to make it easier for you, I created a pack with all the necessities, without using mods that are disallowed on some servers, like crystal optimizers and totem counters. What it does add, are utilities like armor HUD, lower fire and shield, short swords, tier tags, and more.
# Features
Press 'G' to turn on Fullbright. Includes waypoints, which can be useful. Also has TierTagger and SubTierTagger, allowing you to view tested players' skill level. You can also save and load inventories with _/saveinventory **(name)**_, which copies your inventory, which you can then load with _/loadinventory **(name)**_. Using the carpet mod, you can also summon your own player in-game to practice with, using _/player **(any name here)** spawn_ . Add a name at the end of your loadinventory command to give items to the player. However it won't fight you if you're not in TheobaldTheBird's Practice Map. There are plenty of other features, view everything included in the Credit section. Contains a flat world with one layer, no mobs, always day, no weather, and no structures, for minimal lag. This lets you test anything you want here.
# Settings
Revamped PvP comes with settings already changed to benefit you in PvP. It removes damage tilt, darkness pulsing, and view bobbing. It also uses Sodium Extra to get rid of obstructive particles, such as wind bursts and explosians. You will even find that you have preset servers, like PvP Legacy and Stray, and lots more. Heading into the singleplayer tab, you'll have TheobaldTheBird's Practice Map. While the stuff everyone should have removed like damage tilt and view bobbing are off, keybinds, FOV, and FOV Effects are left alone so you can change them to how you prefer.
# Credit
